title: Keep Gardena credentials out of argv
description: The NixOS wrapper reads systemd credentials but passes them as command-line args, which exposes them in process status. Use the binary env var support instead.
implementation: Update module.nix wrapper to export GARDENA_APPLICATION_KEY and GARDENA_APPLICATION_SECRET from CREDENTIALS_DIRECTORY and remove --application-key/--application-secret args from ExecStart.

title: Add websocket heartbeat and graceful close handling
description: Keep the Gardena websocket healthy by sending client heartbeats and by completing the websocket close handshake more cleanly before reconnecting.
close_reason: Implemented websocket heartbeats and graceful close handling

comments.author: Ian Johannesen
comments.text: Implemented websocket heartbeat pings and graceful close-handshake flushing locally. Verified with cargo fmt, cargo test, and cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings -D clippy::pedantic.

implementation:
1. Inspect the websocket loop and current reconnect behavior.
2. Add a periodic client ping while the websocket is open.
3. Handle close frames more gracefully so tungstenite can flush its reply before reconnecting.
4. Add or update tests for the new behavior.
5. Run formatting and tests.

title: Harden systemd startup ordering
description: Avoid switch-time failures when DNS/network is not ready by making the NixOS service wait for network-online and slowing restart retries.
implementation: Update module.nix so prometheus-gardena-exporter orders after and wants network-online.target, and uses RestartSec=30s to avoid immediate start-limit exhaustion on transient DNS failures.
